channel.title: WordPress on YiSheng's secret garden
channel.description: Recent content in WordPress on YiSheng's secret garden

item.title: linux_build_safety_wordpress
item.description:
slug: linux-build-safety-wordpress

Linux 建立安全性wordpress

  1. 安全群組
  2. 20 21 22 80 443

ubuntu 環境建立 1.安裝 Apache Web Server (Step One: Installing apache web server)

sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install apache2

2.安裝MySql

sudo apt-get install mysql-server
sudo mysql_secure_installation

忘記密碼:

sudo mysql

ALTER USER 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY 'password';

3.安裝phpMyAdmin sudo apt install phpmyadmin
